data.title: Kiosk Prototype
data.subtitle: Interactive View
data.description: The biometric kiosk acts as a zero-trust oracle. By processing raw sensors into irreversible cryptographic embeddings locally, no sensitive biometric data ever leaves the device.

data.title: Sensor, Camera, and Display
data.subtitle: Off-the-shelf peripherals operating in a strictly controlled environment

components.name:
Logitech C922 Pro
1080p Web-Camera
components.role: Dual-role optical sensor. Feeds raw frames first to the PAD liveness gate, and upon clearance, routes crops to the EfficientNet + STL facial embedding extractor.

components.name: ADHTech Fingerprint Scanner GT-521F52
components.role: Optical sensor configured for raw mode. Internal matching algorithms are bypassed entirely to generate DeepPrint texture vectors for the fuzzy extractor.

components.name: Waveshare 7-inch capacitive LCD
components.role: Capacitive multi-touch terminal providing interactive feedback, consent controls, and real-time transaction lifecycle visibility.

data.title: Physical Network Topology
data.subtitle: Gigabit Ethernet Star Configuration
data.description: The edge nodes communicate via a dedicated Layer-2 switch forming a strict physical Star Topology. This isolates consensus traffic and the IPFS DLT pinning tasks from external networks.
